metadata.description: Create UI components from Figma designs with visual verification, Code Connect, and component registry management.

plugins.name: component-creator
plugins.description: Figma-to-code component creation with SSIM visual verification, Figma Code Connect integration, and component registry management. Reads docs-creator analysis output (design system tokens, naming conventions, styling system) to generate components that match project conventions exactly. Includes adapters for Sciter.js and generic web frameworks.
